prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I'm so deeply sorry for your loss. I can't imagine how difficult this must be for you. Please know that I'm here for you, and you're in my thoughts during this incredibly hard time. Your mum was an amazing person, and her memory will live on through you. Sending you love and strength.
